name: supermarkets-uk-mcp
description: Search and compare grocery prices across UK supermarkets. Returns product details including prices, promotions, descriptions, ingredients, and nutritional information.

tools.name: list_supermarkets
tools.description: List all supported supermarkets with IDs and status

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products across one or more supermarkets

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare prices for a product across all supermarkets

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed product info (price, description, ingredients, nutrition)

tools.name: browse_categories
tools.description: Browse product categories for a supermarket

tools.name: get_basket
tools.description: Get current shopping basket contents (requires login)

tools.name: add_to_basket
tools.description: Add a product to basket or update quantity (requires login)

tools.name: remove_from_basket
tools.description: Remove a product from basket (requires login)
